positive: A minimalist, highly stylized celestial creature, resembling a blend of a winged fox and a cosmic constellation, floating above a delicate pattern of stylized mountain peaks and crescent moons. The creature's silhouette should be sharp, defined by deep indigo and gold ink, filled with subtle glowing stardust and nebula gradients. The mountains and moons are rendered in clean, contrasting white lines against a deep midnight blue background. The overall composition must be perfectly centered and designed to read as a cohesive, high-contrast textile pattern print. Style: Neo-Art Deco celestial etching, highly intricate line work, ethereal, deep space palette. Lighting: Backlit, dramatic halo effect around the creature. Composition: Symmetrical and harmonious, optimized for repeatable apparel printing.
negative: blurry, noisy, artifacts, text, watermark, low quality, ugly, deformed, extra limbs, bad anatomy, photographic, painting, graffiti, realism
